mapper.select: SELECT A.BUYER_CD, A.BID_NUM, A.BID_CNT, #{VOTE_CNT} AS VOTE_CNT, A.VENDOR_CD ,ROUND((A.TECH_SCORE * ROUND(SUM(A.SUM_SCORE) / COUNT(A.EU_SQ), 2)) / 100, 2) AS TECH_SCORE FROM ( SELECT EU.EU_SQ ,(SELECT SUM((T.RESULT_SCORE, 0)) FROM STOCBDET T WHERE T.GATE_CD = EU.GATE_CD AND T.BUYER_CD = EU.BUYER_CD AND T.EI_NUM = EU.EI_NUM AND T.EU_SQ = EU.EU_SQ AND T.VENDOR_CD = AP.VENDOR_CD AND T.EV_EXCEPT_FLAG = '0' AND T.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS SUM_SCORE ,AP.VENDOR_CD ,HD.BUYER_CD, HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT, HD.TECH_SCORE FROM STOCBDHD HD LEFT JOIN STOCBDAP AP ON (AP.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND AP.BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND AP.BID_NUM = HD.BID_NUM AND AP.BID_CNT = HD.BID_CNT AND AP.APP_DATE IS NOT NULL AND AP.FINAL_FLAG = '500' AND AP.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCBDEU EU ON (EU.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND EU.BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND EU.EI_NUM = HD.EI_NUM AND EU.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND HD.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND HD.BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT} AND HD.DEL_FLAG = '0' ) A WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY A.BUYER_CD, A.BID_NUM, A.BID_CNT, A.VENDOR_CD, A.TECH_SCORE

SELECT HD.ANN_NO, HD.ANN_ITEM ,SUBSTR(HD.ANN_DATE, 1, 4) '-' SUBSTR(HD.ANN_DATE, 5, 2) '-' SUBSTR(HD.ANN_DATE, 7, 2) AS ANN_DATE ,getContTypeTxt(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BUYER_CD, HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT, #{ses.langCd}) AS CONT_TYPE_TXT ,HD.BID_USER_ID, GETUSERNAME(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BID_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS BID_USER_NM ,HD.EV_USER_ID, GETUSERNAME(HD.GATE_CD, HD.EV_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS EV_USER_NM ,HD.BUYER_CD, HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT, HD.BID_STATUS ,HD.CONT_TYPE1, HD.CONT_TYPE2, HD.CONT_TYPE3 ,HD.TECH_SCORE FROM STOCBDHD HD WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND HD.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND HD.BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT}

SELECT A.BUYER_CD , A.BID_NUM , A.BID_CNT , A.VENDOR_CD , A.VENDOR_NM , A.CEO_USER_NM , (A.VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM, A.TEL_NUM) AS VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM , A.VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM , A.VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL , A.EV_FINAL_FLAG , A.EV_INCO_REASON , A.EV_ATT_FILE_NUM , A.EV_ATT_FILE_CNT , A.APP_DATE , A.APP_TIME , A.FINAL_FLAG , A.TECH_SCORE , A.VENDOR_VOTE_FLAG FROM ( SELECT AP.BUYER_CD , AP.BID_NUM , AP.BID_CNT , AP.VENDOR_CD ,GETVENDORNAME(AP.GATE_CD, AP.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM ,VNGL.CEO_USER_NM AS CEO_USER_NM ,(CVUR.TEL_NUM, CVUR.CELL_NUM) AS TEL_NUM ,AP.VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM AS VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM ,AP.VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM AS VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM ,AP.VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL AS VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL ,(CASE WHEN AP.EV_FINAL_FLAG IS NULL THEN (CASE WHEN SP.TECH_SCORE IS NULL THEN '' WHEN (SP.TECH_SCORE, 0) >= (HD.MIN_TECH_SCORE, 0) THEN '500' ELSE '600' END) ELSE AP.EV_FINAL_FLAG END) AS EV_FINAL_FLAG -- 규격평가결과 , AP.EV_INCO_REASON , AP.EV_ATT_FILE_NUM ,getFileCount(AP.GATE_CD, AP.EV_ATT_FILE_NUM) AS EV_ATT_FILE_CNT , AP.APP_DATE , AP.APP_TIME , AP.FINAL_FLAG ,SP.TECH_SCORE AS TECH_SCORE ,(CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCBDVO WHERE GATE_CD = AP.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = AP.BUYER_CD AND BID_NUM = AP.BID_NUM AND BID_CNT = AP.BID_CNT AND VENDOR_CD = AP.VENDOR_CD AND VOTE_CNT = (#{VOTE_CNT}, '1') AND VOTE_DATE IS NOT NULL AND DEL_FLAG = '0') > 0 THEN '1' ELSE '0' END) AS VENDOR_VOTE_FLAG FROM STOCBDHD HD JOIN STOCBDAP AP ON (AP.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND AP.BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND AP.BID_NUM = HD.BID_NUM AND AP.BID_CNT = HD.BID_CNT AND AP.APP_DATE IS NOT NULL -- 입찰신청일자 AND AP.FINAL_FLAG = '500' -- 입찰신청 : 적합 AND AP.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCBDSP SP ON (SP.GATE_CD = AP.GATE_CD AND SP.BUYER_CD = AP.BUYER_CD AND SP.BID_NUM = AP.BID_NUM AND SP.BID_CNT = AP.BID_CNT AND SP.VENDOR_CD = AP.VENDOR_CD AND SP.VOTE_CNT = (#{VOTE_CNT}, '1') AND SP.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCVNGL VNGL ON (AP.GATE_CD = VNGL.GATE_CD AND AP.VENDOR_CD = VNGL.VENDOR_CD) LEFT JOIN STOCCVUR CVUR ON (AP.GATE_CD = CVUR.GATE_CD AND AP.REG_USER_ID = CVUR.USER_ID) WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND HD.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND HD.BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT} AND HD.DEL_FLAG = '0' ) A WHERE A.FINAL_FLAG != '600' ORDER BY A.APP_DATE, A.APP_TIME, A.VENDOR_NM

SELECT HD.ANN_NO, HD.ANN_ITEM ,SUBSTR(HD.ANN_DATE, 1, 4) '-' SUBSTR(HD.ANN_DATE, 5, 2) '-' SUBSTR(HD.ANN_DATE, 7, 2) AS ANN_DATE ,getContTypeTxt(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BUYER_CD, HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT, #{ses.langCd}) AS CONT_TYPE_TXT ,SUBSTR(HD.APP_BEGIN_DATE, 1, 4) '-' SUBSTR(HD.APP_BEGIN_DATE, 5, 2) '-' SUBSTR(HD.APP_BEGIN_DATE, 7, 2) ' ' SUBSTR(HD.APP_BEGIN_TIME, 1, 2) || ':' SUBSTR(HD.APP_BEGIN_TIME, 3, 2) ' ~ ' SUBSTR(HD.APP_END_DATE, 1, 4) '-' SUBSTR(HD.APP_END_DATE, 5, 2) '-' SUBSTR(HD.APP_END_DATE, 7, 2) ' ' SUBSTR(HD.APP_END_TIME, 1, 2) || ':' SUBSTR(HD.APP_END_TIME, 3, 2) AS APP_DATE ,PG.BID_BEGIN_DATE, SUBSTR(PG.BID_BEGIN_TIME, 1, 2) AS BID_BEGIN_HOUR, SUBSTR(PG.BID_BEGIN_TIME, 3, 2) AS BID_BEGIN_MIN ,PG.BID_END_DATE, SUBSTR(PG.BID_END_TIME, 1, 2) AS BID_END_HOUR, SUBSTR(PG.BID_END_TIME, 3, 2) AS BID_END_MIN ,PG.OPEN_DATE, SUBSTR(PG.OPEN_TIME, 1, 2) AS OPEN_TIME_HOUR, SUBSTR(PG.OPEN_TIME, 3, 2) AS OPEN_TIME_MIN ,HD.BID_USER_ID, GETUSERNAME(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BID_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS BID_USER_NM ,HD.OPEN_USER_ID ,HD.BUYER_CD, HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT, HD.BID_STATUS ,PG.VOTE_CNT, (PG.VOTE_CNT, 0) + 1 AS NEW_VOTE_CNT FROM STOCBDHD HD JOIN STOCBDPG PG ON (HD.GATE_CD = PG.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = PG.BUYER_CD AND HD.BID_NUM = PG.BID_NUM AND HD.BID_CNT = PG.BID_CNT AND PG.VOTE_CNT = (SELECT MAX(P.VOTE_CNT) FROM STOCBDPG P WHERE P.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND P.BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND P.BID_NUM = HD.BID_NUM AND P.BID_CNT = HD.BID_CNT AND P.DEL_FLAG = '0')) WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND HD.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND HD.BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT}
mapper.insert: MERGE STOCBDPG BDPG USING (SELECT #{ses.gateCd} AS GATE_CD ,#{BUYER_CD} AS BUYER_CD ,#{BID_NUM} AS BID_NUM ,#{BID_CNT} AS BID_CNT ,#{NEW_VOTE_CNT} AS VOTE_CNT ) B ON (BDPG.GATE_CD = B.GATE_CD AND BDPG.BUYER_CD = B.BUYER_CD AND BDPG.BID_NUM = B.BID_NUM AND BDPG.BID_CNT = B.BID_CNT AND BDPG.VOTE_CNT = B.VOTE_CNT) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET MOD_DATE = SYSDATE ,MOD_USER_ID = #{ses.userId} ,BID_BEGIN_DATE = #{BID_BEGIN_DATE} ,BID_BEGIN_TIME = #{BID_BEGIN_HOUR} #{BID_BEGIN_MIN} '00' ,BID_END_DATE = #{BID_END_DATE} ,BID_END_TIME = #{BID_END_HOUR} #{BID_END_MIN} '00' ,OPEN_DATE = #{OPEN_DATE} ,OPEN_TIME = #{OPEN_TIME_HOUR} #{OPEN_TIME_MIN} '00' WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( GATE_CD ,BUYER_CD ,BID_NUM ,BID_CNT ,VOTE_CNT ,REG_DATE ,REG_USER_ID ,MOD_DATE ,MOD_USER_ID ,DEL_FLAG ,BID_BEGIN_DATE ,BID_BEGIN_TIME ,BID_END_DATE ,BID_END_TIME ,OPEN_DATE ,OPEN_TIME ) VALUES ( #{ses.gateCd} ,#{BUYER_CD} ,#{BID_NUM} ,#{BID_CNT} ,#{NEW_VOTE_CNT} ,SYSDATE ,#{ses.userId} ,SYSDATE ,#{ses.userId} ,'0' ,#{BID_BEGIN_DATE} ,#{BID_BEGIN_HOUR} #{BID_BEGIN_MIN} '00' ,#{BID_END_DATE} ,#{BID_END_HOUR} #{BID_END_MIN} '00' ,#{OPEN_DATE} ,#{OPEN_TIME_HOUR} #{OPEN_TIME_MIN} '00' )
mapper.select: SELECT VO.BID_AMT_CERTV , VO.VID_RANDOM , VO.VENDOR_CD , VNGL.IRS_NO FROM STOCBDHD HD JOIN STOCBDVO VO ON (HD.GATE_CD = VO.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = VO.BUYER_CD AND HD.BID_NUM = VO.BID_NUM AND HD.BID_CNT = VO.BID_CNT AND VO.VOTE_CNT = #{VOTE_CNT} AND VO.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCVNGL VNGL ON (VO.GATE_CD = VNGL.GATE_CD AND VO.VENDOR_CD = VNGL.VENDOR_CD) WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND HD.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND HD.BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT}
mapper.update: UPDATE STOCBDES SET MOD_DATE = SYSDATE ,MOD_USER_ID = #{ses.userId} ,ESTM_PRC1 = ESTM_PRC1_ENC ,ESTM_PRC2 = ESTM_PRC2_ENC ,ESTM_PRC3 = ESTM_PRC3_ENC ,ESTM_PRC4 = ESTM_PRC4_ENC ,ESTM_PRC5 = ESTM_PRC5_ENC ,ESTM_PRC6 = ESTM_PRC6_ENC ,ESTM_PRC7 = ESTM_PRC7_ENC ,ESTM_PRC8 = ESTM_PRC8_ENC ,ESTM_PRC9 = ESTM_PRC9_ENC ,ESTM_PRC10 = ESTM_PRC10_ENC ,ESTM_PRC11 = ESTM_PRC11_ENC ,ESTM_PRC12 = ESTM_PRC12_ENC ,ESTM_PRC13 = ESTM_PRC13_ENC ,ESTM_PRC14 = ESTM_PRC14_ENC ,ESTM_PRC15 = ESTM_PRC15_ENC WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT}
mapper.select: SELECT TO_CHAR((VO.CHOICE_ESTM_NUM1, 0)) AS CHOICE_ESTM_NUM1 ,TO_CHAR((VO.CHOICE_ESTM_NUM2, 0)) AS CHOICE_ESTM_NUM2 FROM STOCBDHD HD JOIN STOCBDAP AP ON (HD.GATE_CD = AP.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = AP.BUYER_CD AND HD.BID_NUM = AP.BID_NUM AND HD.BID_CNT = AP.BID_CNT AND AP.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCBDVO VO ON (AP.GATE_CD = VO.GATE_CD AND AP.BUYER_CD = VO.BUYER_CD AND AP.BID_NUM = VO.BID_NUM AND AP.BID_CNT = VO.BID_CNT AND AP.VENDOR_CD = VO.VENDOR_CD AND VO.VOTE_CNT = #{VOTE_CNT} AND VO.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND HD.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND HD.BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT}

SELECT MAX(VO.VENDOR_CD) AS VENDOR_CD , MAX(VO.VOTE_CNT) AS VOTE_CNT FROM STOCBDHD HD JOIN STOCBDVO VO ON (HD.GATE_CD = VO.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = VO.BUYER_CD AND HD.BID_NUM = VO.BID_NUM AND HD.BID_CNT = VO.BID_CNT AND VO.BID_STATUS = '300' AND VO.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND HD.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND HD.BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT} AND HD.BID_STATUS = '2500' AND HD.DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT HD.BUYER_CD , HD.BID_NUM , HD.BID_CNT , AP.FINAL_FLAG , AP.EV_FINAL_FLAG , RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY HD.GATE_CD, HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT ORDER BY (CASE WHEN ((AP.FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600' OR (AP.EV_FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600') THEN 9999999999999 ELSE ((CASE WHEN VO_${VOTE_CNT}.BID_RANK IS NULL THEN (VO_${VOTE_CNT}.VD_TOTAL_AMT, 9999999999999) ELSE VO_${VOTE_CNT}.BID_RANK END)) END)) AS PRICE_RANK ,(CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN ((AP.FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600' OR (AP.EV_FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600') THEN 9999999999999 ELSE ((VO_${VOTE_CNT}.VD_TOTAL_AMT, 9999999999999)) END) < 9999999999999 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS LOTTERY_FLAG , AP.VENDOR_CD ,GETVENDORNAME(AP.GATE_CD, AP.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM ,VNGL.CEO_USER_NM AS CEO_USER_NM ,AP.VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM AS VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM ,AP.VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM AS VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM ,AP.VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL AS VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL , VNFI.TOTAL_LIABILITY_RATE ,(VNFI.CURRENT_ASSET_AMOUNT / (CASE WHEN (VNFI.CURRENT_ASSET_LIABILITY_AMOUNT, 0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE VNFI.CURRENT_ASSET_LIABILITY_AMOUNT END)) * 100 AS CURRENT_ASSET_LIABILITY_RATE , AP.BID_GUAR_AMT
,(${additionalColumnInfo.P_TABLE_ID}.BID_AMT, 0) + (${additionalColumnInfo.P_TABLE_ID}.TCO_AMT, 0) AS ${additionalColumnInfo.P_COLUMN_ID} ,(${additionalColumnInfo.P_TABLE_ID}.TCO_AMT, 0) AS ${additionalColumnInfo.P_TCO_AMT}
,(CASE WHEN HD.CONT_TYPE2 = 'QE' THEN ((HD.BASIC_AMT, HD.PR_AMT), 0) ELSE (HD.PR_AMT, 0) END) AS PR_AMT ,(CASE WHEN HD.ESTM_TYPE IN ('SE', 'PE') THEN ((ES.FINAL_ESTM_PRC, HD.PR_AMT), 0) ELSE (HD.PR_AMT, 0) END) AS PRESUM_AMT , LPAD(CEIL(DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE(11, 99)), 2, '0') AS RANDOM_RANK , RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY HD.GATE_CD, HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT ORDER BY (CASE WHEN ((AP.FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600' OR (AP.EV_FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600') THEN 9999999999999 ELSE ((VO_${VOTE_CNT}.VD_TOTAL_AMT, 9999999999999)) END)) AS ORI_PRICE_RANK , VO_${VOTE_CNT}.ATT_FILE_NUM ,(CASE WHEN VO_${VOTE_CNT}.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NULL THEN '' ELSE TO_CHAR(GETFILECOUNT(HD.GATE_CD, VO_${VOTE_CNT}.ATT_FILE_NUM)) END) AS ATT_FILE_CNT FROM STOCBDHD HD JOIN STOCBDAP AP ON (HD.GATE_CD = AP.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = AP.BUYER_CD AND HD.BID_NUM = AP.BID_NUM AND HD.BID_CNT = AP.BID_CNT AND AP.FINAL_FLAG != '600' AND AP.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCBDES ES ON (HD.GATE_CD = ES.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = ES.BUYER_CD AND HD.BID_NUM = ES.BID_NUM AND HD.BID_CNT = ES.BID_CNT AND ES.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND ES.ESTM_CONFIRM_DATE IS NOT NULL) LEFT JOIN STOCVNGL VNGL ON (AP.GATE_CD = VNGL.GATE_CD AND AP.VENDOR_CD = VNGL.VENDOR_CD) LEFT JOIN STOCVNFI VNFI ON (VNGL.GATE_CD = VNFI.GATE_CD AND VNGL.VENDOR_CD = VNFI.VENDOR_CD AND VNFI.FI_YEAR = (SELECT MAX(FI_YEAR) FROM STOCVNFI S WHERE S.GATE_CD = VNFI.GATE_CD AND S.VENDOR_CD = VNFI.VENDOR_CD AND S.DEL_FLAG = '0'))
LEFT JOIN (SELECT BDVO.GATE_CD, BDVO.BUYER_CD, BDVO.BID_NUM, BDVO.BID_CNT, BDVO.VOTE_CNT , BDVO.VENDOR_CD, BDVO.BID_RANK, BDVO.BID_AMT, BDVO.TCO_AMT ,(BDVO.BID_AMT, 0) + (BDVO.TCO_AMT, 0) AS VD_TOTAL_AMT , BDVO.ATT_FILE_NUM FROM STOCBDVO BDVO JOIN STOCBDVD BDVD ON (BDVD.GATE_CD = BDVO.GATE_CD AND BDVD.BUYER_CD = BDVO.BUYER_CD AND BDVD.BID_NUM = BDVO.BID_NUM AND BDVD.BID_CNT = BDVO.BID_CNT AND BDVD.VENDOR_CD = BDVO.VENDOR_CD AND BDVD.VOTE_CNT = BDVO.VOTE_CNT AND BDVD.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE BDVO.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BDVO.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND BDVO.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND BDVO.BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT} AND BDVO.DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY BDVO.GATE_CD, BDVO.BUYER_CD, BDVO.BID_NUM, BDVO.BID_CNT, BDVO.VOTE_CNT , BDVO.VENDOR_CD, BDVO.BID_RANK, BDVO.BID_AMT, BDVO.TCO_AMT, BDVO.ATT_FILE_NUM ) ${additionalColumnInfo.P_TABLE_ID} ON (AP.GATE_CD = ${additionalColumnInfo.P_TABLE_ID}.GATE_CD AND AP.BUYER_CD = ${additionalColumnInfo.P_TABLE_ID}.BUYER_CD AND AP.BID_NUM = ${additionalColumnInfo.P_TABLE_ID}.BID_NUM AND AP.BID_CNT = ${additionalColumnInfo.P_TABLE_ID}.BID_CNT AND AP.VENDOR_CD = ${additionalColumnInfo.P_TABLE_ID}.VENDOR_CD AND ${additionalColumnInfo.P_TABLE_ID}.VOTE_CNT = #{additionalColumnInfo.P_VOTE_CNT} AND (${additionalColumnInfo.P_TABLE_ID}.BID_AMT, 0) > 0)
WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND HD.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND HD.BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT} AND HD.DEL_FLAG = '0' ) A ORDER BY A.PRICE_RANK

SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT HD.BUYER_CD , HD.BID_NUM , HD.BID_CNT , AP.FINAL_FLAG , AP.EV_FINAL_FLAG , RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY HD.GATE_CD, HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT ORDER BY (CASE WHEN ((AP.FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600' OR (AP.EV_FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600') THEN 9999999999999 ELSE ((CASE WHEN VO_${VOTE_CNT}.BID_RANK IS NULL THEN ((CASE WHEN ((AP.FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600' OR (AP.EV_FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600') THEN 0 ELSE ((VO_${VOTE_CNT}.BID_AMT, 0) + (VO_${VOTE_CNT}.TCO_AMT, 0)) END), 9999999999999) ELSE VO_${VOTE_CNT}.BID_RANK END)) END)) AS PRICE_RANK ,(CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN ((AP.FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600' OR (AP.EV_FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600') THEN 9999999999999 ELSE (((CASE WHEN ((AP.FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600' OR (AP.EV_FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600') THEN 0 ELSE ((VO_${VOTE_CNT}.BID_AMT, 0) + (VO_${VOTE_CNT}.TCO_AMT, 0)) END), 9999999999999)) END) < 9999999999999 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS LOTTERY_FLAG , AP.VENDOR_CD ,GETVENDORNAME(AP.GATE_CD, AP.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM ,VNGL.CEO_USER_NM AS CEO_USER_NM ,AP.VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM AS VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM ,AP.VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM AS VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM ,AP.VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL AS VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL , VNFI.TOTAL_LIABILITY_RATE ,(VNFI.CURRENT_ASSET_AMOUNT / (CASE WHEN (VNFI.CURRENT_ASSET_LIABILITY_AMOUNT, 0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE VNFI.CURRENT_ASSET_LIABILITY_AMOUNT END)) * 100 AS CURRENT_ASSET_LIABILITY_RATE , AP.BID_GUAR_AMT
,((CASE WHEN ((AP.FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600' OR (AP.EV_FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600') THEN 0 ELSE ((${additionalColumnInfo.P_TABLE_ID}.BID_AMT, 0) + (${additionalColumnInfo.P_TABLE_ID}.TCO_AMT, 0)) END), 0) AS ${additionalColumnInfo.P_COLUMN_ID}
,(CASE WHEN HD.CONT_TYPE2 = 'QE' THEN ((HD.BASIC_AMT, HD.PR_AMT), 0) ELSE (HD.PR_AMT, 0) END) AS PR_AMT ,(CASE WHEN HD.ESTM_TYPE IN ('SE', 'PE') THEN ((ES.FINAL_ESTM_PRC, HD.PR_AMT), 0) ELSE (HD.PR_AMT, 0) END) AS PRESUM_AMT , LPAD(CEIL(DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE(11, 99)), 2, '0') AS RANDOM_RANK , RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY HD.GATE_CD, HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT ORDER BY (CASE WHEN ((AP.FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600' OR (AP.EV_FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600') THEN 9999999999999 ELSE (((CASE WHEN ((AP.FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600' OR (AP.EV_FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600') THEN 0 ELSE ((VO_${VOTE_CNT}.BID_AMT, 0) + (VO_${VOTE_CNT}.TCO_AMT, 0)) END), 9999999999999)) END)) AS ORI_PRICE_RANK , VO_${VOTE_CNT}.BID_RMK , VO_${VOTE_CNT}.ATT_FILE_NUM ,(CASE WHEN VO_${VOTE_CNT}.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NULL THEN '' ELSE TO_CHAR(GETFILECOUNT(HD.GATE_CD, VO_${VOTE_CNT}.ATT_FILE_NUM)) END) AS ATT_FILE_CNT FROM STOCBDHD HD JOIN STOCBDAP AP ON (HD.GATE_CD = AP.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = AP.BUYER_CD AND HD.BID_NUM = AP.BID_NUM AND HD.BID_CNT = AP.BID_CNT AND AP.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCBDES ES ON (HD.GATE_CD = ES.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = ES.BUYER_CD AND HD.BID_NUM = ES.BID_NUM AND HD.BID_CNT = ES.BID_CNT AND ES.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND ES.ESTM_CONFIRM_DATE IS NOT NULL) LEFT JOIN STOCVNGL VNGL ON (AP.GATE_CD = VNGL.GATE_CD AND AP.VENDOR_CD = VNGL.VENDOR_CD) LEFT JOIN STOCVNFI VNFI ON (VNGL.GATE_CD = VNFI.GATE_CD AND VNGL.VENDOR_CD = VNFI.VENDOR_CD AND VNFI.FI_YEAR = (SELECT MAX(FI_YEAR) FROM STOCVNFI S WHERE S.GATE_CD = VNFI.GATE_CD AND S.VENDOR_CD = VNFI.VENDOR_CD AND S.DEL_FLAG = '0'))
LEFT JOIN STOCBDVO ${additionalColumnInfo.P_TABLE_ID} ON (AP.GATE_CD = ${additionalColumnInfo.P_TABLE_ID}.GATE_CD AND AP.BUYER_CD = ${additionalColumnInfo.P_TABLE_ID}.BUYER_CD AND AP.BID_NUM = ${additionalColumnInfo.P_TABLE_ID}.BID_NUM AND AP.BID_CNT = ${additionalColumnInfo.P_TABLE_ID}.BID_CNT AND AP.VENDOR_CD = ${additionalColumnInfo.P_TABLE_ID}.VENDOR_CD AND ${additionalColumnInfo.P_TABLE_ID}.VOTE_CNT = #{additionalColumnInfo.P_VOTE_CNT} AND (${additionalColumnInfo.P_TABLE_ID}.BID_AMT, 0) > 0 AND ${additionalColumnInfo.P_TABLE_ID}.DEL_FLAG = '0')
WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND HD.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND HD.BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT} AND HD.DEL_FLAG = '0' ) A ORDER BY A.PRICE_RANK

SELECT A.*, (CASE WHEN A.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NULL THEN '' ELSE TO_CHAR(GETFILECOUNT(A.GATE_CD, A.ATT_FILE_NUM)) END) AS ATT_FILE_CNT FROM ( SELECT HD.GATE_CD , HD.BUYER_CD , HD.BID_NUM , HD.BID_CNT , AP.FINAL_FLAG , RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY HD.GATE_CD, HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT ORDER BY (CASE WHEN ((AP.FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600' OR (AP.EV_FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600') THEN 9999999999999 ELSE ((CASE WHEN VO_${RANK_VOTE_CNT}.BID_RANK IS NULL THEN ((CASE WHEN ((AP.FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600' OR (AP.EV_FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600') THEN 0 ELSE ((VO_${RANK_VOTE_CNT}.BID_AMT, 0) + (VO_${RANK_VOTE_CNT}.TCO_AMT, 0)) END), 9999999999999) ELSE VO_${RANK_VOTE_CNT}.BID_RANK END)) END)) AS PRICE_RANK ,(CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN ((AP.FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600' OR (AP.EV_FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600') THEN 9999999999999 ELSE (((CASE WHEN ((AP.FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600' OR (AP.EV_FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600') THEN 0 ELSE ((VO_${RANK_VOTE_CNT}.BID_AMT, 0) + (VO_${RANK_VOTE_CNT}.TCO_AMT, 0)) END), 9999999999999)) END) < 9999999999999 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS LOTTERY_FLAG , AP.VENDOR_CD, GETVENDORNAME(AP.GATE_CD, AP.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM ,VNGL.CEO_USER_NM AS CEO_USER_NM ,AP.VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM AS VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM ,AP.VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM AS VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM ,AP.VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL AS VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL , VNFI.TOTAL_LIABILITY_RATE ,(VNFI.CURRENT_ASSET_AMOUNT / (CASE WHEN (VNFI.CURRENT_ASSET_LIABILITY_AMOUNT, 0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE VNFI.CURRENT_ASSET_LIABILITY_AMOUNT END)) * 100 AS CURRENT_ASSET_LIABILITY_RATE , AP.BID_GUAR_AMT
,((CASE WHEN ((AP.FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600' OR (AP.EV_FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600') THEN 0 ELSE ((${additionalColumnInfo.P_TABLE_ID}.BID_AMT, 0) + (${additionalColumnInfo.P_TABLE_ID}.TCO_AMT, 0)) END), 0) AS ${additionalColumnInfo.P_COLUMN_ID}
,(CASE WHEN HD.CONT_TYPE2 = 'QE' THEN ((HD.BASIC_AMT, HD.PR_AMT), 0) ELSE (HD.PR_AMT, 0) END) AS PR_AMT ,(CASE WHEN HD.ESTM_TYPE IN ('SE', 'PE') THEN ((ES.FINAL_ESTM_PRC, HD.PR_AMT), 0) ELSE (HD.PR_AMT, 0) END) AS PRESUM_AMT , LPAD(CEIL(DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE(11, 99)), 2, '0') AS RANDOM_RANK , RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY HD.GATE_CD, HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT ORDER BY (CASE WHEN ((AP.FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600' OR (AP.EV_FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600') THEN 9999999999999 ELSE (((CASE WHEN ((AP.FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600' OR (AP.EV_FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600') THEN 0 ELSE ((VO_${RANK_VOTE_CNT}.BID_AMT, 0) + (VO_${RANK_VOTE_CNT}.TCO_AMT, 0)) END), 9999999999999)) END)) AS ORI_PRICE_RANK ,(SELECT SVO.ATT_FILE_NUM FROM STOCBDVO SVO WHERE SVO.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND SVO.BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND SVO.BID_NUM = HD.BID_NUM AND SVO.BID_CNT = HD.BID_CNT AND SVO.VENDOR_CD = AP.VENDOR_CD AND SVO.VOTE_CNT = (SELECT MAX(VOTE_CNT) FROM STOCBDVO DVO WHERE DVO.GATE_CD = SVO.GATE_CD AND DVO.BUYER_CD = SVO.BUYER_CD AND DVO.BID_NUM = SVO.BID_NUM AND DVO.BID_CNT = SVO.BID_CNT AND DVO.VENDOR_CD = SVO.VENDOR_CD AND DVO.DEL_FLAG = '0') AND SVO.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS ATT_FILE_NUM , VO_${RANK_VOTE_CNT}.ATT_FILE_NUM AS ATT_FILE_NUM_BACK ,(CASE WHEN VO_${RANK_VOTE_CNT}.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NULL THEN '' ELSE TO_CHAR(GETFILECOUNT(HD.GATE_CD, VO_${RANK_VOTE_CNT}.ATT_FILE_NUM)) END) AS ATT_FILE_CNT_BACK FROM STOCBDHD HD JOIN STOCBDAP AP ON (HD.GATE_CD = AP.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = AP.BUYER_CD AND HD.BID_NUM = AP.BID_NUM AND HD.BID_CNT = AP.BID_CNT AND AP.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCBDES ES ON (HD.GATE_CD = ES.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = ES.BUYER_CD AND HD.BID_NUM = ES.BID_NUM AND HD.BID_CNT = ES.BID_CNT AND ES.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND ES.ESTM_CONFIRM_DATE IS NOT NULL) LEFT JOIN STOCVNGL VNGL ON (AP.GATE_CD = VNGL.GATE_CD AND AP.VENDOR_CD = VNGL.VENDOR_CD) LEFT JOIN STOCVNFI VNFI ON (VNGL.GATE_CD = VNFI.GATE_CD AND VNGL.VENDOR_CD = VNFI.VENDOR_CD AND VNFI.FI_YEAR = (SELECT MAX(FI_YEAR) FROM STOCVNFI S WHERE S.GATE_CD = VNFI.GATE_CD AND S.VENDOR_CD = VNFI.VENDOR_CD AND S.DEL_FLAG = '0'))
LEFT JOIN STOCBDVO ${additionalColumnInfo.P_TABLE_ID} ON (AP.GATE_CD = ${additionalColumnInfo.P_TABLE_ID}.GATE_CD AND AP.BUYER_CD = ${additionalColumnInfo.P_TABLE_ID}.BUYER_CD AND AP.BID_NUM = ${additionalColumnInfo.P_TABLE_ID}.BID_NUM AND AP.BID_CNT = ${additionalColumnInfo.P_TABLE_ID}.BID_CNT AND AP.VENDOR_CD = ${additionalColumnInfo.P_TABLE_ID}.VENDOR_CD AND ${additionalColumnInfo.P_TABLE_ID}.VOTE_CNT = #{additionalColumnInfo.P_VOTE_CNT} AND (${additionalColumnInfo.P_TABLE_ID}.BID_AMT, 0) > 0 AND ${additionalColumnInfo.P_TABLE_ID}.DEL_FLAG = '0')
WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND HD.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND HD.BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT} AND HD.DEL_FLAG = '0' ) A ORDER BY A.PRICE_RANK

SELECT AP.VENDOR_CD , AP.FINAL_FLAG FROM STOCBDHD HD JOIN STOCBDAP AP ON (HD.GATE_CD = AP.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = AP.BUYER_CD AND HD.BID_NUM = AP.BID_NUM AND HD.BID_CNT = AP.BID_CNT AND AP.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCBDVO VO ON (AP.GATE_CD = VO.GATE_CD AND AP.BUYER_CD = VO.BUYER_CD AND AP.BID_NUM = VO.BID_NUM AND AP.BID_CNT = VO.BID_CNT AND AP.VENDOR_CD = VO.VENDOR_CD AND VO.VOTE_CNT = #{VOTE_CNT} AND VO.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND HD.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND HD.BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT}

SELECT B.* FROM ( SELECT A.GATE_CD , A.BUYER_CD , A.BID_NUM , TO_CHAR(A.BID_CNT) AS BID_CNT , A.VENDOR_CD , TO_CHAR(A.VENDOR_MAX_VOTE_CNT) AS VENDOR_MAX_VOTE_CNT , TO_CHAR(A.RANK_VOTE_CNT) AS RANK_VOTE_CNT ,(SELECT TO_CHAR(V.BID_RANK) FROM STOCBDVO V WHERE V.GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND V.BUYER_CD = A.BUYER_CD AND V.BID_NUM = A.BID_NUM AND V.BID_CNT = A.BID_CNT AND V.VOTE_CNT = A.RANK_VOTE_CNT AND V.VENDOR_CD = A.VENDOR_CD AND V.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS BID_RANK FROM ( SELECT SVO.GATE_CD , SVO.BUYER_CD , SVO.BID_NUM , SVO.BID_CNT , SVO.VENDOR_CD , MAX(SVO.VOTE_CNT) AS VENDOR_MAX_VOTE_CNT ,(SELECT MAX(VOTE_CNT) FROM STOCBDVO V WHERE V.GATE_CD = SVO.GATE_CD AND V.BUYER_CD = SVO.BUYER_CD AND V.BID_NUM = SVO.BID_NUM AND V.BID_CNT = SVO.BID_CNT AND V.BID_RANK IS NOT NULL AND V.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS RANK_VOTE_CNT FROM STOCBDVO SVO JOIN STOCBDAP AP ON (SVO.GATE_CD = AP.GATE_CD AND SVO.BUYER_CD = AP.BUYER_CD AND SVO.BID_NUM = AP.BID_NUM AND SVO.BID_CNT = AP.BID_CNT AND SVO.VENDOR_CD = AP.VENDOR_CD AND (CASE WHEN ((AP.FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600' OR (AP.EV_FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600') THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) = 'Y' AND AP.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE SVO.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND SVO.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND SVO.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND SVO.BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT} AND SVO.BID_AMT > 0 AND SVO.DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY SVO.GATE_CD, SVO.BUYER_CD, SVO.BID_NUM, SVO.BID_CNT, SVO.VENDOR_CD ) A ) B ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(B.BID_RANK)

SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT HD.BUYER_CD , HD.BID_NUM , HD.BID_CNT , VO.VOTE_CNT ,(CASE WHEN VO.BID_RANK IS NULL THEN '-' ELSE TO_CHAR(VO.BID_RANK) END) AS PRICE_RANK , RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY HD.GATE_CD, HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT ORDER BY (CASE WHEN ((AP.FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600' OR (AP.EV_FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600') THEN 9999999999999 ELSE ((CASE WHEN VO.BID_RANK IS NULL THEN (VO.VD_TOTAL_AMT, 9999999999999) ELSE VO.BID_RANK END)) END), CEIL(DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE(11, 99))) AS SORT_RANK , AP.VENDOR_CD ,GETVENDORNAME(AP.GATE_CD, AP.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM ,VNGL.CEO_USER_NM AS CEO_USER_NM
,((CASE WHEN ((AP.FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600' OR (AP.EV_FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600') THEN 0 ELSE ((VO.BID_AMT, 0) + (VO.TCO_AMT, 0)) END), 0) AS BID_AMT ,(AP.BID_GUAR_AMT, 0) AS BID_GUAR_AMT , '5' AS BID_GUAR_RATE ,((SP.TECH_SCORE, (PRE_SP.TECH_SCORE, FIRST_SP.TECH_SCORE)), 0) AS TECH_SCORE ,((SP.PRC_SCORE, PRE_SP.PRC_SCORE), 0) AS PRC_SCORE ,((SP.TECH_SCORE, (PRE_SP.TECH_SCORE, FIRST_SP.TECH_SCORE)), 0) + ((SP.PRC_SCORE, PRE_SP.PRC_SCORE), 0) AS SUM_SCORE ,(CASE WHEN VO.BID_RANK IS NULL THEN '' WHEN VO.BID_STATUS IS NOT NULL THEN VO.BID_STATUS ELSE (CASE WHEN (SP.TECH_SCORE, 0) < (HD.MIN_TECH_SCORE, 0) OR (SP.PRC_SCORE, 0) + (SP.TECH_SCORE, 0) < (HD.MIN_TOT_SCORE, 0) THEN '600' ELSE (CASE WHEN ((AP.FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600' OR (AP.EV_FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600') THEN '600' ELSE '100' END) END) END) AS BID_STATUS , SP.TECH_ATT_FILE_NUM ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = SP.GATE_CD AND UUID = SP.TECH_ATT_FILE_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS TECH_ATT_FILE_CNT , SP.TECH_RMK ,(SELECT MAX(SVO.VOTE_CNT) FROM STOCBDVO SVO WHERE SVO.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND SVO.BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND SVO.BID_NUM = HD.BID_NUM AND SVO.BID_CNT = HD.BID_CNT AND SVO.VENDOR_CD = AP.VENDOR_CD AND SVO.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS VENDOR_MAX_VOTE_CNT , AP.NEGO_ATT_FILE_NUM ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = AP.GATE_CD AND UUID = AP.NEGO_ATT_FILE_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS NEGO_ATT_FILE_CNT , AP.NEGO_RMK , AP.ETC_ATT_FILE_NUM ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = AP.GATE_CD AND UUID = AP.ETC_ATT_FILE_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS ETC_ATT_FILE_CNT , AP.ETC_RMK FROM STOCBDHD HD JOIN STOCBDAP AP ON (HD.GATE_CD = AP.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = AP.BUYER_CD AND HD.BID_NUM = AP.BID_NUM AND HD.BID_CNT = AP.BID_CNT AND AP.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCBDES ES ON (HD.GATE_CD = ES.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = ES.BUYER_CD AND HD.BID_NUM = ES.BID_NUM AND HD.BID_CNT = ES.BID_CNT AND ES.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND ES.ESTM_CONFIRM_DATE IS NOT NULL) LEFT JOIN STOCVNGL VNGL ON (AP.GATE_CD = VNGL.GATE_CD AND AP.VENDOR_CD = VNGL.VENDOR_CD) LEFT JOIN (SELECT BDVO.GATE_CD, BDVO.BUYER_CD, BDVO.BID_NUM, BDVO.BID_CNT, BDVO.VOTE_CNT , BDVO.VENDOR_CD, BDVO.BID_STATUS, BDVO.BID_RANK, BDVO.BID_AMT, BDVO.TCO_AMT ,(BDVO.BID_AMT, 0) + (BDVO.TCO_AMT, 0) AS VD_TOTAL_AMT FROM STOCBDVO BDVO JOIN STOCBDVD BDVD ON (BDVD.GATE_CD = BDVO.GATE_CD AND BDVD.BUYER_CD = BDVO.BUYER_CD AND BDVD.BID_NUM = BDVO.BID_NUM AND BDVD.BID_CNT = BDVO.BID_CNT AND BDVD.VENDOR_CD = BDVO.VENDOR_CD AND BDVD.VOTE_CNT = BDVO.VOTE_CNT AND BDVD.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE BDVO.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BDVO.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND BDVO.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND BDVO.BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT} AND BDVO.DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY BDVO.GATE_CD, BDVO.BUYER_CD, BDVO.BID_NUM, BDVO.BID_CNT, BDVO.VOTE_CNT , BDVO.VENDOR_CD, BDVO.BID_STATUS, BDVO.BID_RANK, BDVO.BID_AMT, BDVO.TCO_AMT ) VO ON (AP.GATE_CD = VO.GATE_CD AND AP.BUYER_CD = VO.BUYER_CD AND AP.BID_NUM = VO.BID_NUM AND AP.BID_CNT = VO.BID_CNT AND AP.VENDOR_CD = VO.VENDOR_CD AND VO.VOTE_CNT = #{VOTE_CNT}) LEFT JOIN STOCBDSP SP ON (AP.GATE_CD = SP.GATE_CD AND AP.BUYER_CD = SP.BUYER_CD AND AP.BID_NUM = SP.BID_NUM AND AP.BID_CNT = SP.BID_CNT AND VO.VOTE_CNT = SP.VOTE_CNT AND AP.VENDOR_CD = SP.VENDOR_CD AND SP.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCBDSP PRE_SP ON (AP.GATE_CD = PRE_SP.GATE_CD AND AP.BUYER_CD = PRE_SP.BUYER_CD AND AP.BID_NUM = PRE_SP.BID_NUM AND AP.BID_CNT = PRE_SP.BID_CNT AND AP.VENDOR_CD = PRE_SP.VENDOR_CD AND PRE_SP.VOTE_CNT = TO_NUMBER(#{VOTE_CNT}) - 1 AND PRE_SP.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCBDSP FIRST_SP ON (AP.GATE_CD = FIRST_SP.GATE_CD AND AP.BUYER_CD = FIRST_SP.BUYER_CD AND AP.BID_NUM = FIRST_SP.BID_NUM AND AP.BID_CNT = FIRST_SP.BID_CNT AND AP.VENDOR_CD = FIRST_SP.VENDOR_CD AND FIRST_SP.VOTE_CNT = '1' AND FIRST_SP.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND HD.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND HD.BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT} AND HD.DEL_FLAG = '0' ) A WHERE (A.BID_AMT, 0) > 0 ORDER BY (CASE WHEN A.PRICE_RANK = '-' THEN A.SORT_RANK ELSE TO_NUMBER(A.PRICE_RANK) END)

SELECT B.* FROM ( SELECT A.BUYER_CD , A.BID_NUM , A.BID_CNT , A.VOTE_CNT , TO_CHAR(A.BID_RANK) AS PRICE_RANK , RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY A.GATE_CD, A.BID_NUM, A.BID_CNT ORDER BY A.BID_RANK) AS SORT_RANK , '5' AS BID_GUAR_RATE ,((A.SP_TECH_SCORE, (A.PRE_TECH_SCORE, FIRST_SP.TECH_SCORE)), 0) AS TECH_SCORE ,((A.SP_PRC_SCORE, A.PRE_PRC_SCORE), 0) AS PRC_SCORE ,((A.SP_TECH_SCORE, (A.PRE_TECH_SCORE, FIRST_SP.TECH_SCORE)), 0) + ((A.SP_PRC_SCORE, A.PRE_PRC_SCORE), 0) AS SUM_SCORE ,(CASE WHEN A.BID_RANK IS NULL THEN '' WHEN A.ORI_BID_STATUS IS NOT NULL THEN A.ORI_BID_STATUS ELSE (CASE WHEN ((A.SP_TECH_SCORE, (A.PRE_TECH_SCORE, FIRST_SP.TECH_SCORE)), 0) < (A.MIN_TECH_SCORE, 0) OR ((A.SP_PRC_SCORE, A.PRE_PRC_SCORE), 0) + ((A.SP_TECH_SCORE, (A.PRE_TECH_SCORE, FIRST_SP.TECH_SCORE)), 0) < (A.MIN_TOT_SCORE, 0) THEN '600' ELSE (CASE WHEN A.PASS_FLAG = 'N' THEN '600' ELSE '100' END) END) END) AS BID_STATUS , A.VENDOR_MAX_VOTE_CNT , A.VENDOR_CD , VNGL.VENDOR_NM ,VNGL.CEO_USER_NM AS CEO_USER_NM , A.BID_AMT , A.BID_GUAR_AMT , A.ORI_BID_STATUS , A.TECH_ATT_FILE_NUM , A.TECH_ATT_FILE_CNT , A.TECH_RMK , A.NEGO_ATT_FILE_NUM , A.NEGO_ATT_FILE_CNT , A.NEGO_RMK , A.ETC_ATT_FILE_NUM , A.ETC_ATT_FILE_CNT , A.ETC_RMK FROM (
SELECT HD.GATE_CD , HD.BUYER_CD , HD.BID_NUM , HD.BID_CNT , VO.VOTE_CNT , AP.VENDOR_CD ,SP.TECH_SCORE AS SP_TECH_SCORE ,PRE_SP.TECH_SCORE AS PRE_TECH_SCORE , SP.PRC_SCORE AS SP_PRC_SCORE , PRE_SP.PRC_SCORE AS PRE_PRC_SCORE
,((CASE WHEN ((AP.FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600' OR (AP.EV_FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600') THEN 0 ELSE ((VO.BID_AMT, 0) + (VO.TCO_AMT, 0)) END), 0) AS BID_AMT ,(AP.BID_GUAR_AMT, 0) AS BID_GUAR_AMT , VO.BID_STATUS AS ORI_BID_STATUS , #{vendorData.VENDOR_MAX_VOTE_CNT} AS VENDOR_MAX_VOTE_CNT ,(SELECT SVO.BID_RANK FROM STOCBDVO SVO WHERE SVO.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND SVO.BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND SVO.BID_NUM = HD.BID_NUM AND SVO.BID_CNT = HD.BID_CNT AND SVO.VENDOR_CD = AP.VENDOR_CD AND SVO.VOTE_CNT = #{vendorData.RANK_VOTE_CNT} AND SVO.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS BID_RANK , HD.SB_LIMIT_RATE , HD.PR_AMT ,(CASE WHEN ((AP.FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600' OR (AP.EV_FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600') THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) AS PASS_FLAG , HD.MIN_TECH_SCORE , HD.MIN_TOT_SCORE , SP.TECH_ATT_FILE_NUM ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = SP.GATE_CD AND UUID = SP.TECH_ATT_FILE_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS TECH_ATT_FILE_CNT , SP.TECH_RMK , AP.NEGO_ATT_FILE_NUM ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = AP.GATE_CD AND UUID = AP.NEGO_ATT_FILE_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS NEGO_ATT_FILE_CNT , AP.NEGO_RMK , AP.ETC_ATT_FILE_NUM ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = AP.GATE_CD AND UUID = AP.ETC_ATT_FILE_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS ETC_ATT_FILE_CNT , AP.ETC_RMK FROM STOCBDHD HD JOIN STOCBDAP AP ON (HD.GATE_CD = AP.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = AP.BUYER_CD AND HD.BID_NUM = AP.BID_NUM AND HD.BID_CNT = AP.BID_CNT AND AP.VENDOR_CD = #{vendorData.VENDOR_CD} AND AP.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCBDVO VO ON (AP.GATE_CD = VO.GATE_CD AND AP.BUYER_CD = VO.BUYER_CD AND AP.BID_NUM = VO.BID_NUM AND AP.BID_CNT = VO.BID_CNT AND AP.VENDOR_CD = VO.VENDOR_CD AND VO.VOTE_CNT = #{vendorData.VENDOR_MAX_VOTE_CNT} AND (VO.BID_AMT, 0) > 0 AND VO.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCBDSP SP ON (AP.GATE_CD = SP.GATE_CD AND AP.BUYER_CD = SP.BUYER_CD AND AP.BID_NUM = SP.BID_NUM AND AP.BID_CNT = SP.BID_CNT AND VO.VOTE_CNT = SP.VOTE_CNT AND AP.VENDOR_CD = SP.VENDOR_CD AND SP.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCBDSP PRE_SP ON (AP.GATE_CD = PRE_SP.GATE_CD AND AP.BUYER_CD = PRE_SP.BUYER_CD AND AP.BID_NUM = PRE_SP.BID_NUM AND AP.BID_CNT = PRE_SP.BID_CNT AND AP.VENDOR_CD = PRE_SP.VENDOR_CD AND PRE_SP.VOTE_CNT = TO_NUMBER(#{vendorData.VENDOR_MAX_VOTE_CNT}) - 1 AND PRE_SP.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.BUYER_CD = #{vendorData.BUYER_CD} AND HD.BID_NUM = #{vendorData.BID_NUM} AND HD.BID_CNT = #{vendorData.BID_CNT} AND HD.DEL_FLAG = '0'
) A LEFT OUTER JOIN STOCBDES ES ON (A.GATE_CD = ES.GATE_CD AND A.BUYER_CD = ES.BUYER_CD AND A.BID_NUM = ES.BID_NUM AND A.BID_CNT = ES.BID_CNT AND ES.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND ES.ESTM_CONFIRM_DATE IS NOT NULL) LEFT OUTER JOIN STOCBDSP FIRST_SP ON (A.GATE_CD = FIRST_SP.GATE_CD AND A.BUYER_CD = FIRST_SP.BUYER_CD AND A.BID_NUM = FIRST_SP.BID_NUM AND A.BID_CNT = FIRST_SP.BID_CNT AND A.VENDOR_CD = FIRST_SP.VENDOR_CD AND FIRST_SP.VOTE_CNT = '1' AND FIRST_SP.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCVNGL VNGL ON (A.GATE_CD = VNGL.GATE_CD AND A.VENDOR_CD = VNGL.VENDOR_CD) ) B WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY (CASE WHEN B.PRICE_RANK = '-' THEN B.SORT_RANK ELSE TO_NUMBER(B.PRICE_RANK) END)

SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT HD.BUYER_CD , HD.BID_NUM , HD.BID_CNT , VO.VOTE_CNT , AP.VENDOR_CD , RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY HD.GATE_CD, HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT ORDER BY (CASE WHEN ((AP.FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600' OR (AP.EV_FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600') THEN -1 ELSE ((SP.TECH_SCORE, 0) + (SP.PRC_SCORE, 0)) END) DESC , (SP.TECH_SCORE, 0) DESC , CEIL(DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE(11, 99))) AS PRICE_RANK FROM STOCBDHD HD JOIN STOCBDAP AP ON (HD.GATE_CD = AP.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = AP.BUYER_CD AND HD.BID_NUM = AP.BID_NUM AND HD.BID_CNT = AP.BID_CNT AND AP.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN (SELECT BDVO.GATE_CD, BDVO.BUYER_CD, BDVO.BID_NUM , BDVO.BID_CNT, BDVO.VOTE_CNT, BDVO.VENDOR_CD FROM STOCBDVO BDVO JOIN STOCBDVD BDVD ON (BDVD.GATE_CD = BDVO.GATE_CD AND BDVD.BUYER_CD = BDVO.BUYER_CD AND BDVD.BID_NUM = BDVO.BID_NUM AND BDVD.BID_CNT = BDVO.BID_CNT AND BDVD.VENDOR_CD = BDVO.VENDOR_CD AND BDVD.VOTE_CNT = BDVO.VOTE_CNT AND BDVD.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE BDVO.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BDVO.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND BDVO.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND BDVO.BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT} AND BDVO.DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY BDVO.GATE_CD, BDVO.BUYER_CD, BDVO.BID_NUM , BDVO.BID_CNT, BDVO.VOTE_CNT, BDVO.VENDOR_CD) VO ON (AP.GATE_CD = VO.GATE_CD AND AP.BUYER_CD = VO.BUYER_CD AND AP.BID_NUM = VO.BID_NUM AND AP.BID_CNT = VO.BID_CNT AND AP.VENDOR_CD = VO.VENDOR_CD AND VO.VOTE_CNT = #{VOTE_CNT}) JOIN STOCBDSP SP ON (AP.GATE_CD = SP.GATE_CD AND AP.BUYER_CD = SP.BUYER_CD AND AP.BID_NUM = SP.BID_NUM AND AP.BID_CNT = SP.BID_CNT AND VO.VOTE_CNT = SP.VOTE_CNT AND AP.VENDOR_CD = SP.VENDOR_CD AND SP.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND HD.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND HD.BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT} AND HD.DEL_FLAG = '0' ) A ORDER BY A.PRICE_RANK

SELECT A.VENDOR_CD, A.VENDOR_NM, A.CEO_USER_NM ,(A.VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM, A.TEL_NUM) AS VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM, A.VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM, A.VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL ,A.TECH_SCORE, A.TECH_RMK, A.TECH_ATT_FILE_NUM, A.TECH_ATT_FILE_CNT ,A.BUYER_CD, A.BID_NUM, A.BID_CNT, A.VOTE_CNT ,A.VENDOR_VOTE_FLAG FROM ( SELECT AP.VENDOR_CD, GETVENDORNAME(AP.GATE_CD, AP.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM ,VNGL.CEO_USER_NM AS CEO_USER_NM ,(CVUR.TEL_NUM, CVUR.CELL_NUM) AS TEL_NUM ,AP.VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM AS VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM ,AP.VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM AS VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM ,AP.VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL AS VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL ,SP.TECH_SCORE AS TECH_SCORE ,SP.TECH_RMK ,SP.TECH_ATT_FILE_NUM, getFileCount(SP.GATE_CD, SP.TECH_ATT_FILE_NUM) AS TECH_ATT_FILE_CNT ,AP.BUYER_CD, AP.BID_NUM, AP.BID_CNT, #{VOTE_CNT} AS VOTE_CNT ,(CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCBDVO WHERE GATE_CD = AP.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = AP.BUYER_CD AND BID_NUM = AP.BID_NUM AND BID_CNT = AP.BID_CNT AND VENDOR_CD = AP.VENDOR_CD AND VOTE_CNT = (#{VOTE_CNT}, '1') AND VOTE_DATE IS NOT NULL AND DEL_FLAG = '0') > 0 THEN '1' ELSE '0' END) AS VENDOR_VOTE_FLAG FROM STOCBDHD HD JOIN STOCBDAP AP ON (AP.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND AP.BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND AP.BID_NUM = HD.BID_NUM AND AP.BID_CNT = HD.BID_CNT AND AP.APP_DATE IS NOT NULL AND AP.FINAL_FLAG = '500' AND AP.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCBDSP SP ON (AP.GATE_CD = SP.GATE_CD AND AP.BUYER_CD = SP.BUYER_CD AND AP.BID_NUM = SP.BID_NUM AND AP.BID_CNT = SP.BID_CNT AND AP.VENDOR_CD = SP.VENDOR_CD
AND SP.VOTE_CNT = (SELECT MAX(BDSP.VOTE_CNT) FROM STOCBDSP BDSP WHERE SP.GATE_CD = BDSP.GATE_CD AND SP.BUYER_CD = BDSP.BUYER_CD AND SP.BID_NUM = BDSP.BID_NUM AND SP.BID_CNT = BDSP.BID_CNT AND SP.VENDOR_CD = BDSP.VENDOR_CD AND BDSP.DEL_FLAG = '0')) LEFT JOIN STOCVNGL VNGL ON (AP.GATE_CD = VNGL.GATE_CD AND AP.VENDOR_CD = VNGL.VENDOR_CD) LEFT JOIN STOCCVUR CVUR ON (AP.GATE_CD = CVUR.GATE_CD AND AP.REG_USER_ID = CVUR.USER_ID) WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND HD.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND HD.BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT} AND HD.DEL_FLAG = '0' ) A ORDER BY A.VENDOR_NM

SELECT HD.BUYER_CD , HD.BID_NUM , HD.BID_CNT , HD.BID_STATUS , HD.BID_STATUS AS PRE_BID_STATUS , PG.VOTE_CNT , HD.CONT_TYPE1 , HD.CONT_TYPE2 , HD.CONT_TYPE3 , HD.OPEN_USER_ID , HD.ANN_NO , HD.ANN_ITEM , SUBSTR(HD.ANN_DATE, 1, 4) '-' SUBSTR(HD.ANN_DATE, 5, 2) '-' SUBSTR(HD.ANN_DATE, 7, 2) AS ANN_DATE ,getContTypeTxt(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BUYER_CD, HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT, #{ses.langCd}) AS CONT_TYPE_TXT , HD.BID_USER_ID, GETUSERNAME(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BID_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS BID_USER_NM ,(HD.PR_AMT, 0) AS PR_AMT ,(HD.BASIC_AMT, 0) AS BASIC_AMT ,(ES.FINAL_ESTM_PRC, (HD.BASIC_AMT, 0)) AS FINAL_ESTM_PRC ,((SELECT MIN(VO.BID_AMT) FROM STOCBDVO VO WHERE VO.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND VO.BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND VO.BID_NUM = HD.BID_NUM AND VO.BID_CNT = HD.BID_CNT AND VO.VOTE_CNT = PG.VOTE_CNT AND VO.DEL_FLAG = '0'), 0) AS MIN_BID_AMT ,GETCOMCODE(HD.GATE_CD, 'M023', HD.CUR, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS CUR ,'(' GETCOMCODE(HD.GATE_CD, 'M100', HD.VAT_TYPE, 0, #{ses.langCd}) ')' AS VAT_TYPE ,(HD.CONF_STD_SCORE, 0) AS CONF_STD_SCORE ,(HD.PRC_SCORE, 0) AS PRC_SCORE , HD.ESTM_TYPE, HD.DIFF_GUAR_FLAG, HD.ESTM_LIMIT_RATE, HD.VOTE_LIMIT_CNT AS CHECK_VOTE_LIMIT_CNT ,(SELECT MAX(DT.PR_BUYER_CD) FROM STOCBDDT DT WHERE DT.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND DT.BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND DT.BID_NUM = HD.BID_NUM AND DT.BID_CNT = HD.BID_CNT AND DT.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS PR_BUYER_CD ,(SELECT MAX(PG.VOTE_CNT) FROM STOCBDPG PG WHERE PG.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND PG.BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND PG.BID_NUM = HD.BID_NUM AND PG.BID_CNT = HD.BID_CNT AND PG.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS VOTE_LIMIT_CNT , HD.SB_LIMIT_RATE , HD.NEGO_APP_DOC_NUM , HD.NEGO_APP_DOC_CNT , HD.NEGO_SIGN_STATUS , TO_CHAR(HD.NEGO_START_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS NEGO_START_DATE , TO_CHAR(HD.NEGO_END_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS NEGO_END_DATE FROM STOCBDHD HD JOIN STOCBDPG PG ON (HD.GATE_CD = PG.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = PG.BUYER_CD AND HD.BID_NUM = PG.BID_NUM AND HD.BID_CNT = PG.BID_CNT AND PG.VOTE_CNT = #{VOTE_CNT} AND PG.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCBDES ES ON (HD.GATE_CD = ES.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = ES.BUYER_CD AND HD.BID_NUM = ES.BID_NUM AND HD.BID_CNT = ES.BID_CNT AND ES.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND HD.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND HD.BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT}
AND HD.NEGO_APP_DOC_NUM = #{NEGO_APP_DOC_NUM}

SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT HD.BUYER_CD , HD.BID_NUM , HD.BID_CNT , VO.VOTE_CNT , RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY HD.GATE_CD, HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT ORDER BY (CASE WHEN ((AP.FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600' OR (AP.EV_FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600') THEN 9999999999999 ELSE ((CASE WHEN VO.BID_RANK IS NULL THEN (VO.VD_TOTAL_AMT, 9999999999999) ELSE VO.BID_RANK END)) END)) AS PRICE_RANK ,(CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN ((AP.FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600' OR (AP.EV_FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600') THEN 9999999999999 ELSE (((CASE WHEN ((AP.FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600' OR (AP.EV_FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600') THEN 0 ELSE VO.BID_AMT END), 9999999999999)) END) < 9999999999999 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS LOTTERY_FLAG , AP.VENDOR_CD ,GETVENDORNAME(AP.GATE_CD, AP.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM ,VNGL.CEO_USER_NM AS CEO_USER_NM
,((CASE WHEN ((AP.FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600' OR (AP.EV_FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600') THEN 0 ELSE ((VO.BID_AMT, 0) + (VO.TCO_AMT, 0)) END), 0) AS BID_AMT ,(AP.BID_GUAR_AMT, 0) AS BID_GUAR_AMT , '5' AS BID_GUAR_RATE ,(SP.TECH_SCORE, 0) AS TECH_SCORE ,(SP.PRC_SCORE, 0) AS PRC_SCORE ,(SP.TECH_SCORE, 0) + (SP.PRC_SCORE, 0) AS SUM_SCORE ,(CASE WHEN VO.BID_RANK IS NULL THEN '' WHEN VO.BID_STATUS IS NOT NULL THEN VO.BID_STATUS ELSE (CASE WHEN ((AP.FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600' OR (AP.EV_FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600') THEN '600' ELSE '100' END) END) AS BID_STATUS , SP.TECH_ATT_FILE_NUM , SP.TECH_RMK , LPAD(CEIL(DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE(11, 99)), 2, '0') AS RANDOM_RANK , RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY HD.GATE_CD, HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT ORDER BY (CASE WHEN ((AP.FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600' OR (AP.EV_FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600') THEN 9999999999999 ELSE ((VO.VD_TOTAL_AMT, 9999999999999)) END)) AS ORI_PRICE_RANK ,(SELECT MAX(SVO.VOTE_CNT) FROM STOCBDVO SVO WHERE SVO.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND SVO.BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND SVO.BID_NUM = HD.BID_NUM AND SVO.BID_CNT = HD.BID_CNT AND SVO.VENDOR_CD = AP.VENDOR_CD AND SVO.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS VENDOR_MAX_VOTE_CNT FROM STOCBDHD HD JOIN STOCBDAP AP ON (HD.GATE_CD = AP.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = AP.BUYER_CD AND HD.BID_NUM = AP.BID_NUM AND HD.BID_CNT = AP.BID_CNT AND AP.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCBDES ES ON (HD.GATE_CD = ES.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = ES.BUYER_CD AND HD.BID_NUM = ES.BID_NUM AND HD.BID_CNT = ES.BID_CNT AND ES.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND ES.ESTM_CONFIRM_DATE IS NOT NULL) LEFT JOIN STOCVNGL VNGL ON (AP.GATE_CD = VNGL.GATE_CD AND AP.VENDOR_CD = VNGL.VENDOR_CD) LEFT JOIN (SELECT BDVO.GATE_CD, BDVO.BUYER_CD, BDVO.BID_NUM, BDVO.BID_CNT, BDVO.VOTE_CNT, BDVO.VENDOR_CD, BDVO.BID_STATUS, BDVO.BID_RANK, BDVO.BID_AMT, BDVO.TCO_AMT ,(BDVO.BID_AMT, 0) + (BDVO.TCO_AMT, 0) AS VD_TOTAL_AMT FROM STOCBDVO BDVO JOIN STOCBDVD BDVD ON (BDVD.GATE_CD = BDVO.GATE_CD AND BDVD.BUYER_CD = BDVO.BUYER_CD AND BDVD.BID_NUM = BDVO.BID_NUM AND BDVD.BID_CNT = BDVO.BID_CNT AND BDVD.VENDOR_CD = BDVO.VENDOR_CD AND BDVD.VOTE_CNT = BDVO.VOTE_CNT AND BDVD.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE BDVO.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BDVO.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND BDVO.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND BDVO.BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT} AND BDVO.DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY BDVO.GATE_CD, BDVO.BUYER_CD, BDVO.BID_NUM, BDVO.BID_CNT, BDVO.VOTE_CNT , BDVO.VENDOR_CD, BDVO.BID_STATUS, BDVO.BID_RANK, BDVO.BID_AMT, BDVO.TCO_AMT ) VO ON (AP.GATE_CD = VO.GATE_CD AND AP.BUYER_CD = VO.BUYER_CD AND AP.BID_NUM = VO.BID_NUM AND AP.BID_CNT = VO.BID_CNT AND AP.VENDOR_CD = VO.VENDOR_CD AND VO.VOTE_CNT = #{VOTE_CNT}) LEFT OUTER JOIN STOCBDSP SP ON (AP.GATE_CD = SP.GATE_CD AND AP.BUYER_CD = SP.BUYER_CD AND AP.BID_NUM = SP.BID_NUM AND AP.BID_CNT = SP.BID_CNT AND VO.VOTE_CNT = SP.VOTE_CNT AND AP.VENDOR_CD = SP.VENDOR_CD AND SP.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND HD.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND HD.BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT} AND HD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND (VO.BID_AMT, 0) > 0 ) A ORDER BY A.PRICE_RANK

SELECT B.* FROM ( SELECT A.BUYER_CD , A.BID_NUM , A.BID_CNT , A.VOTE_CNT , TO_CHAR(A.BID_RANK) AS PRICE_RANK , RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY A.GATE_CD, A.BID_NUM, A.BID_CNT ORDER BY A.BID_RANK) AS SORT_RANK , A.VENDOR_CD , VNGL.VENDOR_NM, VNGL.CEO_USER_NM AS CEO_USER_NM ,(A.BID_GUAR_AMT, 0) AS BID_GUAR_AMT , '5' AS BID_GUAR_RATE ,((A.SP_TECH_SCORE, (A.PRE_TECH_SCORE, FIRST_SP.TECH_SCORE)), 0) AS TECH_SCORE ,((A.SP_PRC_SCORE, A.PRE_PRC_SCORE), 0) AS PRC_SCORE ,((A.SP_TECH_SCORE, (A.PRE_TECH_SCORE, FIRST_SP.TECH_SCORE)), 0) + ((A.SP_PRC_SCORE, A.PRE_PRC_SCORE), 0) AS SUM_SCORE ,(CASE WHEN A.BID_RANK IS NULL THEN '' WHEN A.ORI_BID_STATUS IS NOT NULL THEN A.ORI_BID_STATUS ELSE (CASE WHEN A.PASS_FLAG = 'N' THEN '600' ELSE '100' END) END) AS BID_STATUS , A.TECH_ATT_FILE_NUM , A.TECH_RMK , A.BID_AMT , A.ORI_BID_STATUS , A.VENDOR_MAX_VOTE_CNT , 'Z' AS LOTTERY_FLAG FROM (
SELECT HD.GATE_CD , HD.BUYER_CD , HD.BID_NUM , HD.BID_CNT , VO.VOTE_CNT , AP.VENDOR_CD ,SP.TECH_SCORE AS SP_TECH_SCORE ,PRE_SP.TECH_SCORE AS PRE_TECH_SCORE , SP.PRC_SCORE AS SP_PRC_SCORE, PRE_SP.PRC_SCORE AS PRE_PRC_SCORE , SP.TECH_ATT_FILE_NUM , SP.TECH_RMK
,((CASE WHEN ((AP.FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600' OR (AP.EV_FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600') THEN 0 ELSE ((VO.BID_AMT, 0) + (VO.TCO_AMT, 0)) END), 0) AS BID_AMT ,(AP.BID_GUAR_AMT, 0) AS BID_GUAR_AMT , VO.BID_STATUS AS ORI_BID_STATUS , #{vendorData.VENDOR_MAX_VOTE_CNT} AS VENDOR_MAX_VOTE_CNT ,(SELECT SVO.BID_RANK FROM STOCBDVO SVO WHERE SVO.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND SVO.BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND SVO.BID_NUM = HD.BID_NUM AND SVO.BID_CNT = HD.BID_CNT AND SVO.VENDOR_CD = AP.VENDOR_CD AND SVO.VOTE_CNT = #{vendorData.RANK_VOTE_CNT} AND SVO.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS BID_RANK , HD.SB_LIMIT_RATE , HD.PR_AMT , HD.BASIC_AMT ,(CASE WHEN ((AP.FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600' OR (AP.EV_FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600') THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) AS PASS_FLAG FROM STOCBDHD HD JOIN STOCBDAP AP ON (HD.GATE_CD = AP.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = AP.BUYER_CD AND HD.BID_NUM = AP.BID_NUM AND HD.BID_CNT = AP.BID_CNT AND AP.VENDOR_CD = #{vendorData.VENDOR_CD} AND AP.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCBDVO VO ON (AP.GATE_CD = VO.GATE_CD AND AP.BUYER_CD = VO.BUYER_CD AND AP.BID_NUM = VO.BID_NUM AND AP.BID_CNT = VO.BID_CNT AND AP.VENDOR_CD = VO.VENDOR_CD AND VO.VOTE_CNT = #{vendorData.VENDOR_MAX_VOTE_CNT} AND (VO.BID_AMT, 0) > 0 AND VO.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCBDSP SP ON (AP.GATE_CD = SP.GATE_CD AND AP.BUYER_CD = SP.BUYER_CD AND AP.BID_NUM = SP.BID_NUM AND AP.BID_CNT = SP.BID_CNT AND VO.VOTE_CNT = SP.VOTE_CNT AND AP.VENDOR_CD = SP.VENDOR_CD AND SP.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCBDSP PRE_SP ON (AP.GATE_CD = PRE_SP.GATE_CD AND AP.BUYER_CD = PRE_SP.BUYER_CD AND AP.BID_NUM = PRE_SP.BID_NUM AND AP.BID_CNT = PRE_SP.BID_CNT AND AP.VENDOR_CD = PRE_SP.VENDOR_CD AND PRE_SP.VOTE_CNT = TO_NUMBER(#{vendorData.VENDOR_MAX_VOTE_CNT}) - 1 AND PRE_SP.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.BUYER_CD = #{vendorData.BUYER_CD} AND HD.BID_NUM = #{vendorData.BID_NUM} AND HD.BID_CNT = #{vendorData.BID_CNT} AND HD.DEL_FLAG = '0'
) A LEFT JOIN STOCBDES ES ON (A.GATE_CD = ES.GATE_CD AND A.BUYER_CD = ES.BUYER_CD AND A.BID_NUM = ES.BID_NUM AND A.BID_CNT = ES.BID_CNT AND ES.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND ES.ESTM_CONFIRM_DATE IS NOT NULL) LEFT JOIN STOCBDSP FIRST_SP ON (A.GATE_CD = FIRST_SP.GATE_CD AND A.BUYER_CD = FIRST_SP.BUYER_CD AND A.BID_NUM = FIRST_SP.BID_NUM AND A.BID_CNT = FIRST_SP.BID_CNT AND A.VENDOR_CD = FIRST_SP.VENDOR_CD AND FIRST_SP.VOTE_CNT = '1' AND FIRST_SP.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCVNGL VNGL ON (A.GATE_CD = VNGL.GATE_CD AND A.VENDOR_CD = VNGL.VENDOR_CD) ) B ORDER BY (CASE WHEN B.PRICE_RANK = '-' THEN B.SORT_RANK ELSE TO_NUMBER(B.PRICE_RANK) END)

SELECT HD.BUYER_CD ,#{EXEC_WT_NUM} AS EXEC_WT_NUM ,HD.DEPT_CD ,HD.BID_USER_ID AS CTRL_USER_ID ,'BID' AS RFX_TYPE ,VO.VENDOR_CD ,HD.BID_NUM ,HD.BID_CNT ,VO.VOTE_CNT ,DT.ITEM_SQ ,DT.PR_NUM ,DT.PR_SQ ,DT.PB_BUYER_CD FROM STOCBDHD HD JOIN STOCBDDT DT ON (HD.GATE_CD = DT.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = DT.BUYER_CD AND HD.BID_NUM = DT.BID_NUM AND HD.BID_CNT = DT.BID_CNT AND DT.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCBDVO VO ON (HD.GATE_CD = VO.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = VO.BUYER_CD AND HD.BID_NUM = VO.BID_NUM AND HD.BID_CNT = VO.BID_CNT AND VO.BID_STATUS = '300' AND VO.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND HD.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND HD.BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT} AND HD.DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT BDHD.ANN_ITEM , BDVO.REG_USER_ID AS RECV_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(BDVO.GATE_CD, BDVO.REG_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS RECV_USER_NM , VNGL.VENDOR_NM ,GETCOMPANYNAME(BDHD.GATE_CD, (SELECT MAX(DT.PR_BUYER_CD) FROM STOCBDDT DT WHERE DT.GATE_CD = BDHD.GATE_CD AND DT.BUYER_CD = BDHD.BUYER_CD AND DT.BID_NUM = BDHD.BID_NUM AND DT.BID_CNT = BDHD.BID_CNT AND DT.DEL_FLAG = '0'), #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_NM , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(BDHD.ANN_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS ANN_FROM_DATE ,(CASE WHEN TO_DATE(BDHD.APP_BEGIN_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') - 1 < TO_DATE(BDHD.ANN_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') THEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(BDHD.ANN_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') ELSE TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(BDHD.APP_BEGIN_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') - 1, 'YYYY-MM-DD') END) AS ANN_TO_DATE ,(SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(PG.BID_END_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') FROM STOCBDPG PG WHERE PG.GATE_CD = BDHD.GATE_CD AND PG.BUYER_CD = BDHD.BUYER_CD AND PG.BID_NUM = BDHD.BID_NUM AND PG.BID_CNT = BDHD.BID_CNT AND PG.VOTE_CNT = BDVO.VOTE_CNT AND PG.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS BID_END_DATE ,GETCOMCODE(BDHD.GATE_CD, 'M301', BDHD.CONT_TYPE1, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS CONT_TYPE1_LOC ,GETCOMCODE(BDHD.GATE_CD, 'M302', BDHD.CONT_TYPE2, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS CONT_TYPE2_LOC , TO_CHAR(BDVO.VOTE_CNT) AS VOTE_CNT ,(CASE WHEN BDVO.BID_STATUS = '300' THEN '낙찰' ELSE '탈락' END) AS SETTLE_FLAG_LOC ,(SELECT listagg(L.VENDOR_NM,',') WITHIN GROUP (order by L.VENDOR_NM) FROM STOCBDVO V LEFT JOIN STOCVNGL L ON (V.GATE_CD = L.GATE_CD AND V.VENDOR_CD = L.VENDOR_CD) WHERE V.GATE_CD = BDHD.GATE_CD AND V.BUYER_CD = BDHD.BUYER_CD AND V.BID_NUM = BDHD.BID_NUM AND V.BID_CNT = BDHD.BID_CNT AND V.VOTE_CNT = BDVO.VOTE_CNT AND V.BID_STATUS = '300' AND V.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS SETTLE_VENDOR_NM -- 2021.06.30 : SMS 과금추가 ,(SELECT IRS_NUM FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = BDHD.GATE_CD AND CUST_CD = BDHD.BUYER_CD) AS CORP_NO ,(SELECT DEPT_CD FROM STOCCVUR WHERE GATE_CD = BDHD.GATE_CD AND USER_ID = BDHD.BID_USER_ID) AS BRC ,(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS APLY_DT , BDHD.BID_USER_ID AS USER_ID , 'SMS_BID_SEL' '@@' BDHD.GATE_CD '@@' BDHD.BUYER_CD '@@' BDHD.BID_NUM '@@' BDHD.BID_CNT '@@' BDVO.VOTE_CNT '@@' BDVO.VENDOR_CD AS CONT_TBL_PK , NULL AS FILE_SIZE FROM STOCBDHD BDHD JOIN STOCBDAP BDAP ON (BDHD.GATE_CD = BDAP.GATE_CD AND BDHD.BUYER_CD = BDAP.BUYER_CD AND BDHD.BID_NUM = BDAP.BID_NUM AND BDHD.BID_CNT = BDAP.BID_CNT AND BDAP.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCBDVO BDVO ON (BDAP.GATE_CD = BDVO.GATE_CD AND BDAP.BUYER_CD = BDVO.BUYER_CD AND BDAP.BID_NUM = BDVO.BID_NUM AND BDAP.BID_CNT = BDVO.BID_CNT AND BDAP.VENDOR_CD = BDVO.VENDOR_CD AND BDVO.VOTE_CNT = #{VOTE_CNT} AND BDVO.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCVNGL VNGL ON (BDAP.GATE_CD = VNGL.GATE_CD AND BDAP.VENDOR_CD = VNGL.VENDOR_CD) WHERE BDHD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BDHD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND BDHD.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND BDHD.BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT} AND BDHD.DEL_FLAG = '0'
